params.name: The Walking Man
params.description:
On Jun 5, 1961 AD, the master sculptor Giacometti completed the Walking Man.
The Walking Man, one of the most iconic sculptures of the 20th century, is a masterpiece by Swedish sculptor Giacometti. It is the most well-known piece in the series and is viewed as a symbol of modern art. In 2010, the sculpture was sold for a staggering 65 million British pounds at an auction, making it one of the most expensive sculptures in the world.
